name: Black Bean & Salmon Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces (1 cup) Corn black beans, rinsed and drained
7 ounces (1 cup) Pink salmon, bones removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cut tortillas into triangles and toast in the oven until crisp, about 5 minutes.
3. Combine beans and salmon in a bowl; flake the salmon with a fork.
4. Mix remaining ingredients and chill to blend flavors.
5. Serve with tortilla chips.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 LOW-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 68; CHO: 3mg; CAR: 8g; PRO: 4g; SOD: 75mg; FAT: 2g.
